title: A sharp order-three obstruction to the aggregation of conditional price-of-risk attribution
abstract: arXiv:2606.26835v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: We study the squared price-of-risk premium of a portfolio -- an integrated conditional squared Sharpe-ratio functional, not an expected excess return -- and its attribution to causal drivers. Relative to a declared admissible benchmark it decomposes into intervention-stable premium, a signed causal distortion (the confounding wedge), and a nonnegative information loss; the loss is an $L^2$ projection residual, the wedge is not. The decomposition is well posed exactly when the driver filtration is immersed in the price filtration. It need not aggregate across portfolios pooling drivers: we identify an order-three obstruction that is invisible to every singleton and pairwise admissibility screen -- each one- and two-driver sub-book is immersed while the pooled triple reveals a future innovation -- the analogue of Bernstein's pairwise-but-not-mutually-independent triple, and minimal relative to such pairwise diagnostics. We separate its two

Title: A sharp order-three obstruction to the aggregation of conditional price-of-risk attribution
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26835v1 Announce Type: new  Abstract: We study the squared price-of-risk premium of a portfolio -- an integrated conditional squared Sharpe-ratio functional, not an expected excess return -- and its attribution to causal drivers. Relative to a declared admissible benchmark it decomposes into intervention-stable premium, a signed causal distortion (the confounding wedge), and a nonnegative information loss; the loss is an $L^2$ projection residual, the wedge is not. The decomposition is well posed exactly when the driver filtration is immersed in the price filtration. translated_title: 一个用于条件风险价格归因聚合的三阶尖锐障碍
translated_abstract: 本文研究投资组合的风险价格溢价平方——一个综合条件平方夏普比率泛函，而非预期超额收益——及其对因果驱动因素的归因。相对于一个声明的可接受基准，它分解为干预稳定的溢价、一个有符号的因果扭曲（混杂楔形）以及一个非负的信息损失；该损失是$L^2$投影残差，而扭曲则不是。当驱动因素滤子浸入价格滤子时，该分解是适定的。它不必在汇集驱动因素的投资组合间聚合：我们识别出一个三阶障碍，该障碍对任何单一和成对的可接受性筛选都是不可见的——每个单驱动和双驱动子书是浸入的，而汇集的三者却揭示了一个未来创新——这类似于伯恩斯坦的成对独立但非相互独立的三元组，并且相对于此类成对诊断是最小的。我们区分了它的两种形式。
tldr: 本文发现了一个三阶障碍，使得条件风险价格归因在聚合多个驱动因素时无法保持一致性，该障碍对单变量和双变量检验均不可见，类似于概率论中成对独立但不相互独立的三元组。
en_tdlr: This paper identifies a third-order obstruction that prevents conditional price-of-risk attribution from aggregating across multiple drivers, which is invisible to single and pairwise tests, analogous to the pairwise-but-not-mutually-independent triple in probability theory.
